mapper.select: SELECT t.trip_id AS tripId, t.title AS title, t.description AS description, t.start_date AS startDate, t.end_date AS endDate, t.creator_id AS creatorId FROM trip t WHERE t.party_id = #{partyId} ORDER BY t.start_date ASC, t.end_date ASC, t.trip_id ASC

SELECT t.trip_id AS tripId, t.party_id AS partyId, t.creator_id AS creatorId, t.title AS title, t.description AS description, t.start_date AS startDate, t.end_date AS endDate,
td.trip_day_id AS tripDayId, td.day_num AS dayNum, td.trip_date AS tripDate,
ts.trip_schedule_id AS tripScheduleId, ts.attraction_no AS attractionNo, ts.title AS scheduleTitle, ts.memo AS memo, ts.sort_order AS sortOrder, ts.created_by AS createdBy FROM trip t LEFT JOIN trip_day td ON td.trip_id = t.trip_id LEFT JOIN trip_schedule ts ON ts.trip_day_id = td.trip_day_id WHERE t.party_id = #{partyId} AND t.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY td.day_num ASC, ts.sort_order ASC, ts.trip_schedule_id ASC
